name: atmosphere surface temperature, humidity, wind, and pressure
fields: EXFatemp, EXFaqh, EXFuwind, EXFvwind, EXFwspee, EXFpress
Introduction: This dataset provides 2D fields of atmosphere surface temperature, humidity, winds, and pressure on the lat-lon-cap 90 (llc90) native model grid from the ECCO Version 4 Release 4 (V4r4) ocean and sea-ice state estimate. The dataset is provided on daily-average and monthly-average time resolution.
